title: RF Sustain Basics
content: To sustain Righteous Fire, you need high fire resistance (75%+) and life regeneration. Purity of Fire is mandatory early on.
author: PoeGuru

title: CoC Breakpoints
content: For Cast on Crit, you need to match your attack speed to your cooldown recovery rate. 7.57 APS for 14% CDR.
author: MathilFan

title: Chaos Recipe
content: Vendor a full set of rare items (ilvl 60-74) to get 2 Chaos Orbs. Unidentified gives 2, identified gives 1.
author: NewbieHelper
